codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit e03efc6 and associated worker handoff/transcript. The TemplateSelector in /video-studio was converted to a non-interactive 'Coming Soon' UI, and there are no frontend references to /api/video/auto-edit. Custom font classes used by this feature scope (font-display, font-heading, font-body) are defined in tailwind.config.ts.

sharedStateObservations.observation: fullstack-worker procedure requires agent-browser validation for UI changes, but this worker session did not invoke agent-browser despite modifying a visible UI component; handoff still marks followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md:24,48,50 require agent-browser for UI features; worker-transcripts.jsonl:4 contains the full skeleton for session 007ef34f-856f-4ff9-b121-566eb58f4e15 with no agent-browser tool call.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance documents specify Syne/Space Grotesk for display/body fonts, but the active Tailwind config defines Plus Jakarta Sans/Inter. This mismatch can cause confusion during font-related tasks.

summary: Result: pass. No blocking or non-blocking code defects were found in the feature implementation; requested font-class consistency checks and video-studio auto-edit UI disabling intent are satisfied by the reviewed diff and evidence.
